description: Explicit UI contract for the Provider portal /team route.
non_negotiables: Header has only ONE action button (primary 'Invite').
No StatCards and no FilterBar on this page in v0.4.
Table has only TWO columns: Member (name + email stack) and Role (tag).
Role taxonomy on this page: owner / editor / service. Production may colour-code; v0.4 uses uniform tag colour.
Member name + email use the standard p-cell-stack pattern (strong over meta).
DataTable rows are non-interactive in v0.4 — do NOT bind onRowClick.
An org must always have at least one owner — server enforces; SPA must reflect by disabling the demote/remove buttons for the only owner.
